questions.question: Answer with a number only. How many sea horses are visible in the sculptural group of the landmark in the image?
Answer with a number only. How many human-like sculpted figures are visible in the main fountain sculptures and side niches, excluding figures in relief panels?

Answer with the option letter only. Which column style do the visible columns or pilasters on the façade in the image most closely resemble?
A. Doric

C. Corinthian
D. Gothic
Answer with a number only. How many large rectangular relief panels are visible above the side sections of the fountain façade?
What visible component matches this description: the central mythological male figure?
questions.rgb_answer: The central mythological male figure is the one standing upright with a beard, located on the right side of the façade. He is holding what appears to be a scroll or a book in his left hand and has a muscular build. This figure is part of the sculptural group that adorns the central part of the building, above the cascading water.
